description: Send notifications to your own D7 Networks destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise d7sms:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a D7 Networks Messages API JSON body and post it to rest-api.d7networks.com (no Apprise).
name: msg-to-d7networks_sms

request.template: {"urls":"d7sms://${ customer_secrets.D7NETWORKS_SMS_TOKEN }@${ customer_secrets.D7NETWORKS_SMS_TARGETS }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"d7sms://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"message_globals":{"channel":"sms","originator":"${ customer_secrets.D7NETWORKS_SMS_FROM }"},"messages":[{"recipients":["${ customer_secrets.D7NETWORKS_SMS_TO }"],"content":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and ": " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *},"data_coding":"auto"}]}

{"message_globals":{"channel":"sms","originator":"${ customer_secrets.D7NETWORKS_SMS_FROM }"},"messages":[{"recipients":["${ customer_secrets.D7NETWORKS_SMS_TO }"],"content":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and ": " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *},"data_coding":"auto"}]}
